data.current_description: Main entry point to create a new image analysis. Submit an image for visual attention prediction.
data.summary_suggestion: Submit image for visual attention analysis
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new image analysis to predict visual attention patterns. Accepts an image URL or file in the CreateAnalysisRequest. Returns an AnalysisCreated response containing the analysis ID and status. The analysis is queued for processing and results can be retrieved using the analysis ID.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about input format (URL vs file), return value structure, and processing workflow. Added details about request schema, response structure, and how to retrieve results. Improved summary to be more action-oriented and specific to the domain (visual attention analysis).

message: Operation 'getAnalysis' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is vague about required parameters and return structure. Added clarity about the analysisId parameter requirement and specified that it returns an AnalysisResult object. Clarified that results depend on processing completion status.

data.current_description: Retrieve the status and results of a previously created analysis.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the status and results of a previously created image analysis. Requires the analysisId path parameter from the original analysis creation. Returns an AnalysisResult object containing the visual attention prediction data, processing status, and metadata. Results are available once processing is complete.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about required parameters and return structure. Added clarity about the analysisId parameter requirement and specified that it returns an AnalysisResult object. Clarified that results depend on processing completion status.

data.current_description: Create a visual salience analysis for a video file.
data.summary_suggestion: Submit video for visual salience analysis
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new video analysis to predict visual salience patterns across video frames. Accepts a video file or URL in the CreateVideoAnalysisRequest. Returns a AnalysisCreated response containing the analysis ID and status. The video analysis is queued for processing and results can be retrieved using the analysis ID.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks input format details (file vs URL), return value structure, and processing workflow. Added specificity about request schema, response structure, and retrieval mechanism. Improved summary to be more action-oriented and domain-specific.

message: Operation 'getVideoAnalysis' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks parameter and return value specificity. data.current_description: Retrieve the status and results of a previously created video analysis.
